body:
This is actually our favourite couch we’ve ever had! 
Maybe because we tested and picked it out together, maybe because it feels like a cloud or maybe because I feel stress-free actually living life with kids on it ☁️ 
The @Cozey Ciello XL was made for real life (and real messes) and we’re here for it. 
Plus the Tessella Coffee Table and a one-seater are perfect for those moments when a hot coffee is actually enjoyed ☕️

#CozeyPartner

body:
If you’ve been thinking about a @cozey couch, here’s our honest review after living with this couch for a bit: #ad 
✔ dangerously comfortable
✔ storage we actually use
✔ dog-friendly setup approved by Ollie
✔ makes leaving the house harder than it should be

So yeah… zero regrets 😌 their new store is now open in Calgary on 17th Ave so you can check out all the options in person! #CozeyPartner

body:
#ad #cozeypartner ☁️ Just when I thought my bedroom couldn’t get any cozier…I designed my dream bed with @cozey ‘s new Ara bed system. 

As someone who primarily works from home, my bed gets used for more than just sleeping, so I want it to feel like me. And talk about easy assembly… I put most of it together completely by myself (without a single crash out!!)

From now on, if you need me, you know where I’ll be 😌

body:
The @cozey couches at their new store in Calgary on 17th Ave pass the Ollie test 🐶🛋️ #ad We’ve been on the hunt for something cozy, comfy, and cute and after testing everything in person, the Atmosphere sofa with storage was the one for us! I loved that you can actually sit on the couches before committing, see all the colours and pet-friendly fabric swatches in person, and even map out your exact layout with their miniatures (plus they offer in-store design consults 🤍). It just makes finding the right fit so much easier.

If you’re furniture shopping, definitely check out @cozey’s new showroom.

📍 919 17th Avenue SW, Calgary AB
#CozeyPartner

I loved that you can actually sit on the couches before committing, see all the colours and pet-friendly fabric swatches in person, and even map out your exact layout with their miniatures (plus they offer in-st

body:
Calgary, you’ve been waiting (and waiting), but the big day has finally arrived: Cozey Calgary is now open at 919 17th Avenue SW.

Come inside our beautiful new space to compare sofas, try the new Ara Bed, shop for a rug, table, or storage, or to get free 1:1 help from one of our knowledgable design assistants.

Or, if you just want to escape the cold, come on in and cuddle up on a sofa. It’s warm and cozy in here, and the company is great.

__

Calgary, vous l’attendiez (et l’attendiez encore)… le grand jour est enfin arrivé : Cozey Calgary est maintenant ouvert au 919, 17th Avenue SW.

Entrez découvrir notre magnifique nouvel espace pour comparer nos divans, essayer le nouveau lit Ara, magasiner un tapis, une table ou des solutions de rangement, ou encore profiter d’un accompagnement gratuit en tête-à-tête avec l’un·e de nos conseiller·ères en design.

Et si vous cherchez simplement à fuir le froid, passez nous voir et installez-vous confortablement sur un divan. Ici, c’est chaud, douillet et toujours accueillant.

Calgary, you’ve been waiting (and waiting), but the big day has finally arrived: Cozey Calgary is now open at 919 17th Avenue SW.

Come inside our beautiful new space to compare sofas, try the new Ara Bed, shop for a rug, table, or storage, or to get free 1:1 help from one of our knowledgable design assistants.

Or, if you just want to escape the cold, come on in and cuddle up on a sofa. It’s warm and cozy in here, and the company is great.

__

Calgary, vous l’at

body: We have had our @cozey Ciello sectional for four years now and still love it. The machine washable covers are a huge game changer with multiple kids, especially being in a lighter colour. I just gave the space a little refresh with the Mai rug in red clay and the Eclipse coffee table in walnut and I love the way the space feels new again! I also love changing up the decor on the Altitude shelves over the years for the different seasons. The final Cozey piece is the Solis adjustable table and it has held up amazing with frequent use over the years! 🤍 #CozeyPartner #ad
